name: European Biotech Fund
lp_product_category: Pan-European Series A biotech fund targeting institutional LPs with venture experience and comfort with long-duration, capital-intensive healthcare investing
key_traits: Captures value from world-class European academic biotech research that other regional funds miss due to fragmented national capital markets
Pan-European approach bridges capital gaps across borders in Series A biotech investing
Focus on capital-intensive, long-duration biotech investments with deep understanding of regulatory timelines
